summary: Welcome to Atlanta News & Talk. This site automatically aggregates and summarizes hyperlocal ITP Atlanta news daily. Check back tomorrow for the first automated digest.

stories.headline: Atlanta News & Talk launches
stories.summary: A new hyperlocal news aggregator focused on Inside The Perimeter neighborhoods goes live. The site pulls from local sources like Decaturish, SaportaReport, Urbanize Atlanta, and more, delivering daily digests.
